title: [Test Improver] Monthly Activity 2026-03
body:
🤖 *Test Improver here - I'm an automated AI assistant focused on improving tests for this repository.*

## Activity for March 2026

## Suggested Actions for Maintainer

* [ ] **Review PR**: Test Improver edge-case coverage PR - [Review](https://github.com/soilSpoon/opengoose/pulls) - adds 9 tests for `SessionKey`, `sanitize_name`, and `ProfileStore`

## Maintainer Priorities

No specific priorities communicated yet.

## Testing Opportunities Backlog

1. **opengoose-core `SessionManager`** (high): Complex DB+cache consistency logic with no tests. Blocked in sandbox by `goose` network dependency — needs CI to validate.
2. **opengoose-teams executors** (medium): `ChainExecutor`, `RouterExecutor`, `FanOutExecutor` have existing tests but complex logic paths around step resumption and error handling could use more coverage. Blocked by `goose` dep.
3. **opengoose-secrets** (low): `keyring_backend` tests are solid; additional edge cases possible. Blocked by `libdbus-1-dev`.

## Discovered Commands

| Command | Status | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|
| `cargo test -p opengoose-types -p opengoose-profiles -p opengoose-persistence` | ✅ Validated | Works offline in sandbox |
| `cargo test --workspace` | ⚠️ Partial | Needs network (goose git dep) + `libdbus-1-dev` |
| `cargo +nightly fmt --all --check` | ✅ CI-validated | Nightly toolchain required |
| `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features` | ✅ CI-validated | Needs system deps |

## Run History

### 2026-03-05 15:39 UTC - [Run](https://github.com/soilSpoon/opengoose/actions/runs/22725413500)
- 🔍 Discovered: Only `opengoose-types`, `opengoose-profiles`, `opengoose-persistence` testable offline; `opengoose-core`/`opengoose-teams` blocked by `goose` git dep requiring network
- 🔧 Created PR: edge-case tests for `SessionKey::from_stable_id` (malformed `ns:` prefix + colon-in-channel), `sanitize_name` (Unicode), `ProfileStore::install_defaults` (skip/force count), `ProfileStore::profile_path`
- 📊 Coverage: opengoose-types 37→40 tests, opengoose-profiles 31→34 tests; all pass
